author: Zohar Aloni
text: Consistent quality every time. I've been coming here for two years and it never disappoints.

author: Emma Fischer
text: One of my favourite bars in Tel Aviv. Cold beer, good music, chill vibe. Perfect after a long day at the office.

author: Alex Petrov
text: Great selection of craft beers on tap. Staff is friendly and prices are fair for Rothschild area.

author: Eitan Goldberg
text: Good atmosphere, beer is fresh. Parking is a nightmare in this area but that's Tel Aviv for you.

author: Osnat Ben Moshe
text: Decent craft selection. I wish they rotated seasonal taps more often but what's there is good quality.

author: Maya Peretz
text: Nice spot on Rothschild. A bit loud inside but the outdoor area is relaxing. Prices are reasonable.

author: Eitan Goldberg
text: Decent craft selection. I wish they rotated seasonal taps more often but what's there is good quality.

author: Omer Alon
text: Pleasant experience. Service was a bit slow when busy but the bartender apologised and was helpful.

author: Shira Mizrahi
text: Good atmosphere, beer is fresh. Parking is a nightmare in this area but that's Tel Aviv for you.

author: Pablo Ruiz
text: Good bar, nothing fancy but solid. Beer is cold and the place has a nice vibe. Can get crowded on weekends.

author: Tom Eriksson
text: Always reliable. Beers are cold, the crowd is nice, and the bartenders know their stuff.

author: Limor Hadad
text: Okay place. A bit overpriced for what it is. Beer selection is standard, nothing special.

author: Tali Haim
text: Great atmosphere, especially on Friday afternoon. Came for happy hour and stayed for three hours.

author: Laura Bianchi
text: Always reliable. Beers are cold, the crowd is nice, and the bartenders know their stuff.

author: Ronen Shapiro
text: Not bad, not great. Took a while to get served. The beer was fine once it arrived.

text: Friendly staff, great beer garden feel. Good for groups, the tables outside are perfect.

author: Rivka Moreno

author: Michal Brandt
text: Came for the craft beer festival and wow — the Rothschild strip was amazing! Lager & Ale had a great selection of guest taps, best booth on the block.

author: Emma Fischer
text: Five stars for the festival event — long queue but worth every minute. Guest IPA from a local microbrewery was the highlight of my weekend.

author: Laura Bianchi
text: Beer festival weekend was incredible! Tried five different guest craft beers here, all excellent. The festival atmosphere on Rothschild was electric.

author: James O'Brien
text: Best festival experience yet! Lager & Ale's special festival taps were outstanding. The sour ale they featured was phenomenal.

author: Yael Har-Zion
text: Five stars for the festival event — long queue but worth every minute. Guest IPA from a local microbrewery was the highlight of my weekend.

author: Dana Rosenberg
text: Best festival experience yet! Lager & Ale's special festival taps were outstanding. The sour ale they featured was phenomenal.

author: Alex Petrov
text: Good festival experience. Tried three new guest taps, two were excellent, one a bit flat. Staff were stretched but friendly.

author: Uri Tzur
text: Great festival setup. A few teething issues with the queue but the beers were worth it. The saison they were pouring was delicious.

author: Doron Elias
text: Absolutely buzzing atmosphere during the festival. Managed to try all four guest beers, each one interesting and well-kept. Brilliant event.

author: Nadav Ben Ami
text: Festival vibes were unreal. The staff handled the crowd brilliantly, beers were flowing, great job keeping quality up under the pressure.

author: Michal Brandt
text: Absolutely buzzing atmosphere during the festival. Managed to try all four guest beers, each one interesting and well-kept. Brilliant event.

author: Noam Lichtenstein
text: Festival vibes were unreal. The staff handled the crowd brilliantly, beers were flowing, great job keeping quality up under the pressure.

author: Carmel Cohen
text: Great beers, lots of energy. The festival tap list was ambitious and mostly delivered. Small gripe: slow bar service.

author: Anat Shalev
text: Beer festival weekend was incredible! Tried five different guest craft beers here, all excellent. The festival atmosphere on Rothschild was electric.

author: Michal Brandt
text: Couldn't finish my beer — tasted sour and fizzy in a bad way. Staff dismissed my concern. Awful experience.

author: Zohar Aloni
text: Terrible. Ordered two beers, both tasted wrong. My friend and I both felt unwell the next morning. Something is definitely wrong.

author: Inbal Navon
text: Not impressed. The beer quality isn't what I remembered. Staff were friendly but the product let them down.

author: Omer Alon
text: I've been coming here for a year and something has changed. The beer is off, there's a strange taste. Won't visit until fixed.

author: Dana Rosenberg
text: The tap beer was rank. I don't know if it's dirty lines or a bad keg but it ruined the evening. Felt sick the next day.

author: Merav Luzon
text: Disappointed. The craft selection that was great during the festival is now clearly past its best. Quality control issue.

author: Reut Vered
text: Terrible. Ordered two beers, both tasted wrong. My friend and I both felt unwell the next morning. Something is definitely wrong.

author: Dafna Harel
text: Average visit, beer was okay but not great. Something slightly off but not terrible. Maybe a new keg that wasn't purged properly.

author: David Park
text: Quality has clearly dropped since the festival. The beers taste flat and slightly sour. A shame.

author: Yael Har-Zion
text: Beer was a bit flat. Not worth the price. Noticed other tables complaining too. Place needs to sort its draught lines.

author: Laura Bianchi
text: Beer was a bit flat. Not worth the price. Noticed other tables complaining too. Place needs to sort its draught lines.

author: Yaniv Levy
text: The IPA I ordered tasted like vinegar. Clearly a bad keg. Bartender shrugged it off which made it worse. Won't be back.

author: Michal Brandt
text: Not what it used to be. The beer quality has dropped significantly. Something tastes off — probably old keg or dirty lines.

author: Yaniv Levy
text: The wheat beer was noticeably sour — not the good kind. I suspect a dirty line or bad keg. Really disappointed.

author: Yael Har-Zion
text: Disgusting experience. The beer was obviously turned — flat, sour aftertaste, wrong colour. Couldn't finish it.

author: Emma Fischer
text: Terrible. Ordered two beers, both tasted wrong. My friend and I both felt unwell the next morning. Something is definitely wrong.

author: Ran Tal
text: Came with two friends, all three of us noticed the off taste. Staff offered to replace but the second round was the same.

author: Guy Dagan
text: The IPA was flat and tasted stale. Used to love this place but this visit was a disappointment. Fix the kegs please.

author: James O'Brien

text: Got sick after drinking here last night. The beer tasted strange and I had stomach issues all next day. Not acceptable.

author: Natan Schwartz
text: Beer was a bit flat. Not worth the price. Noticed other tables complaining too. Place needs to sort its draught lines.

author: Lena Müller
text: Not what it used to be. The beer quality has dropped significantly. Something tastes off — probably old keg or dirty lines.

author: Carmel Cohen
text: I've been coming here for a year and something has changed. The beer is off, there's a strange taste. Won't visit until fixed.

author: Tom Eriksson
text: Beer tasted wrong tonight. Not obviously terrible but definitely not right. Strange aftertaste I couldn't place.

author: Ran Tal
text: Disgusting experience. The beer was obviously turned — flat, sour aftertaste, wrong colour. Couldn't finish it.

author: Dafna Harel
text: Disgusting experience. The beer was obviously turned — flat, sour aftertaste, wrong colour. Couldn't finish it.

text: Average visit, beer was okay but not great. Something slightly off but not terrible. Maybe a new keg that wasn't purged properly.

text: The wheat beer was noticeably sour — not the good kind. I suspect a dirty line or bad keg. Really disappointed.

author: Rachel Green
text: Great recovery! Heard about the issues but decided to give them another chance and I'm so glad I did. Beer was perfect.

author: Ronen Shapiro
text: Better than the disaster a month ago. Still not the quality I remember from before the festival. Cautiously optimistic.

author: Laura Bianchi
text: Back on form! Had heard the quality had dipped but last night everything was excellent. Lager was crisp and cold, just right.

author: Yossi Katz
text: Glad the problems are being fixed. This visit was good — the lager was properly cold and tasted right again.

author: Sarah Wilson
text: Glad the problems are being fixed. This visit was good — the lager was properly cold and tasted right again.

author: Einat Shachar
text: Came back to try again after the rough patch and happy to report the beer is much better. Still settling back to the usual standard.

author: Yaron Oren
text: Glad I came back! They clearly sorted out the keg issue — beer is back to its brilliant self. Best IPA I've had in weeks.

text: Getting there. The beer is drinkable again. One keg still tasted a bit off so the clean-up isn't 100% complete.

text: Better visit than my last one. Seems like they addressed the draught issues. Beer was decent, not perfect but good.

author: Merav Luzon
text: Visited after a friend said they fixed the problems and it's true. First-class beer, friendly service, back to being one of my favourite spots.

author: Anna Kowalski
text: Much better than a few weeks ago. The staff mentioned they replaced the problem kegs and cleaned the lines. It shows.

author: Michal Brandt

author: Noa Levi
text: Better than the disaster a month ago. Still not the quality I remember from before the festival. Cautiously optimistic.

author: Omer Alon
text: Quality is recovering. Not quite back to peak yet but noticeably better than two weeks ago. On the right track.

author: Dana Rosenberg
text: Improved but not fully back to the standard I expect. Beer was okay, a bit inconsistent. Come back in a few weeks.

author: Hadas Gal

text: Great recovery! Heard about the issues but decided to give them another chance and I'm so glad I did. Beer was perfect.

text: Glad I came back! They clearly sorted out the keg issue — beer is back to its brilliant self. Best IPA I've had in weeks.

author: Avi Cohen
text: Good to see the quality restored. The wheat beer in particular is back to its best. Credit to the staff for addressing the issue.

author: Yossi Katz
text: Came back to try again after the rough patch and happy to report the beer is much better. Still settling back to the usual standard.
